params.SpellDescription: If the {2}{U} cost was paid, you draw three cards, then an opponent creates two Treasure tokens and they scry 2. If that cost wasn't paid, you draw X cards.

params.Description: You may pay {2}{U} rather than pay this spell's mana cost.
